name: context-window-inspector
description: Inspect Codex context-window usage, token attribution, and estimated cost from local session logs.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Codex context usage and token attribution.
interface.longDescription: Context Window Inspector adds a Codex tool for reading local session logs and reporting exact context-window usage, estimated bucket attribution, and API-equivalent cost.
defaultPrompt: Show my Codex context window usage.
What is filling this Codex context?
Inspect the latest Codex token budget.
